reviews.review_description: First free episode 5 minutes.  Then 2nd episode i pay.  Not more then 5 minutes with only 2 choices.  I couldn't beleive it finish so fast.  I then try 5 times to see but yep, i think there is only 5 minutes on the 2nd episode.  But 3 stars for the try

developer_response.body: Hi PatrickFX. Thanks for the review and interest in the Wentworth VR app. We hope to be working on new episodes in the future and will take your recommendations on episode length on-board. Thanks again for the time taken to view the app.

reviews.review_description: loved it when's the 3rd scene coming out can't wait email me asap please

developer_response.body: Hi laconnor67, we're so glad you loved Wentworth VR! We're hoping to build more episodes in 2018, thanks for your support.

reviews.review_title: Great story. Just wish there was more!
reviews.review_description: This is a great example of interactive film making. The acting is excellent and the story is fascinating. I just wish there was more content. Definitely worth downloading.
I don't no what I just paid for it's confusing and kind of whack

developer_response.body: Hi kbasey, we'd love to help improve your experience. If you could send through specific details of any issues you're experiencing, as well as the device you're using, to support@startvr.co, we'll help you out ASAP.
